conditionThreshold.filter:
metric.type = "serviceruntime.googleapis.com/api/request_latencies"
resource.type = "consumed_api"
(resource.labels.method = "example.api.v1.ApiService.SearchPlaces" OR resource.labels.method = "example.api.v1.ApiService.GetTripDetail" OR resource.labels.method = "example.api.v1.ApiService.GetTripDetailSeries" OR resource.labels.method = "example.api.v1.ApiService.ListTrips" OR resource.labels.method = "example.api.v1.ApiService.ListTripSeries" OR resource.labels.method = "example.api.v1.ApiService.GetUser"
)

condition.displayName: 重要 endpoint の応答が遅くなっています
condition.name: projects/your-gcp-project-id/alertPolicies/1234567890123456789/conditions/1234567890123456789

incident.condition_name: 重要 endpoint の応答が遅くなっています

documentation.content:
【概要】
重要 endpoint の応答時間が継続して悪化しており、特定 API 操作のユーザ体験が低下している可能性があります。

【対象】
・サービス: example-grpc-esp-hash-an.a.run.app

incident.policy_name: 重要 endpoint の応答が遅くなっています
incident.resource_name: your-gcp-project-id Consumed API labels {project_id=your-gcp-project-id, service=example-grpc-esp-hash-an.a.run.app, method=example.api.v1.ApiService.GetTripDetail, version=v1, location=asia-northeast1, credential_id=apikey:AIzaSy_dummy_key_for_testing_only}
incident.summary: Request latencies for your-gcp-project-id Consumed API labels {project_id=your-gcp-project-id, service=example-grpc-esp-hash-an.a.run.app, method=example.api.v1.ApiService.GetTripDetail, version=v1, location=asia-northeast1, credential_id=apikey:AIzaSy_dummy_key_for_testing_only} is above the threshold of 0.750 with a value of 0.931.
